title: deschampsia sukatschewii subsp. minor
intro: Deschampsia sukatschewii subsp. minor, also known as lesser brome or Russian brome, is a type of grass belonging to the Poaceae family. It is traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Deschampsia sukatschewii subsp. minor include its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its use in wound healing and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing the leaves and stems in hot water or using them in tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
